You NEED to try this marg season recipe! It’s the perfect sweet and spicy @josecuervotequila margarita 🌶️🍍

Recipe below! ⬇️

Ingredients: 
2oz Cuervo Trad Blanco 
.25oz Fresh Lime Juice
.75oz  Fresh Pineapple Juice
.25oz Jalapeno Infused Agave 
1.5oz Grapefruit Lime Tepache 

Instructions: 
1. In a Shaker Tin, combine Cuervo, Fresh Lime Juice, Fresh Pineapple Juice, and Jalapeno Infused Agave. Add ice and shake vigorously for 15 seconds
2. Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice. Top with 2oz of Grapefruit Lime Tepache. Quick stir to incorporate. 
3. Garnish with a Dehydrated Pineapple Wheel and a Tamarindo Candy Straw.

INTRODUCING THE KING-ARITA! Inspired by fun & flirty summer vibes , @josecuervotequila & I teamed up to create a strawberry, passion fruit margarita that will be a guaranteed smash all summer! 

Here are the steps & ingredients to make your own King-arita at home! 

Ingredients
2oz Cuervo Trad Blanco
1oz Fresh Lime Juice
.5oz Passion Fruit Syrup
.25oz Agave Nectar

Garnish: Edible Orchid, Fresh Strawberry

Method: Begin by very lightly muddling 1 cut strawberry in a rocks glass. You can use a muddler, or the back of a spoon to slightly crush the cut strawberry segments.

In a shaker tin, combine Cuervo Tradicional Blanco, fresh lime juice, passion fruit syrup and agave nectar. Add ice and shake vigorously. Add ice to rocks glass and strain the cocktail over ice.

Garnish with an edible orchid and fresh strawberry
Cheers! Let me know how you like it in the comments <3

Margs taste so much better when our Cuervo Collective makes them 🤩🎶 Keeping summer vibes going with the perfect sweet and spicy @josecuervotequila margarita 🌶️🍍 Recipe below!! @dinabn

Ingredients: 
2oz Cuervo Trad Blanco 
.25oz Fresh Lime Juice
.75oz  Fresh Pineapple Juice
.25oz Spicy Agave Nectar
1.5oz Grapefruit Lime Tepache 

Instructions: 
1. In a Shaker Tin, combine Cuervo, Fresh Lime Juice, Fresh Pineapple Juice, and Spicy Agave Nectar. Add ice and shake vigorously for 15 seconds.
2. Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice. Top with 1.5oz of Grapefruit Lime Tepache. Quick stir to incorporate. 
3. Garnish with a Dehydrated Pineapple Wheel and a Tamarindo Candy Straw.

The perfect holiday themed Cuervo Tradicional cocktails are here! These 3 drinks are sure to be a hit at any gathering this season! Make your own with the ingredients and steps below ⬇️ 

🍒 Cranberry Spritz
Ingredients:
1 1/2 oz blanco tequila• 1 oz cranberry juice • 1/2 oz lime juice • 3 oz sparkling water
Steps:
Add tequila, cranberry juice, and lime juice to a glass.
Add ice.
Pour in sparkling water.
Stir gently.
Garnish if you want (lime wheel, cranberries).

🍎 Apple Pie Margarita
Ingredients:
2 oz añejo tequila • 3 oz apple cider • 1/2 oz lemon juice • 1/2 oz brown sugar syrup •
pinch pumpkin spice • apple slices + cinnamon stick
Steps:
Add tequila, apple cider, lemon juice, syrup, and pumpkin spice to a shaker.
Add ice and shake well.
Strain into a glass with fresh ice.
Garnish with apple slices and a cinnamon stick.

💚 Pistachio Espresso Martini
Ingredients:
2 oz blanco tequila • 1 oz pistachio liqueur • 1 oz espresso/cold brew concentrate • 1/2 oz 
brown sugar syrup • ice • crushed pistachios (rim)
Steps:
Rim the glass with syrup and dip in crushed pistachios.
Add tequila, pistachio liqueur, espresso, and syrup to a shaker.
Fill with ice.
Shake hard until frothy and cold.
Strain into your rimmed glass.
